content:
Let's discuss Review Datasets in general! I'd like to hear about the range of use cases that other folks are envisioning in this category. Very curious about reproducibility reviews, or AI-readiness reviews, etc.

Edited to add: I should have also mentioned Clinical Data Reviews, too! I don't know if anyone out there might be making different sorts of clinical data available for sharing.

One more edit: Here is a rubric for AI-readiness, for instance.
A message was moved here from #dev > Improved "Related datasets" by Philip Durbin 🚀.

I just made a pull request:

add "review" dataset type #11753

It's just a draft for now but feedback is welcome!

Here's how the "Review" facet looks in the new UI (the React SPA):

Screenshot 2025-08-18 at 3.35.19 PM.png

Hmm, I haven't written anything here for a while but review datasets shipped with Dataverse 6.10! As the release notes say, you can read about them at https://guides.dataverse.org/en/6.10/user/dataset-management.html#review-datasets
I would also recommend watching part of yesterday's community call, where we talked about review datasets. Here's the video (you can safely fast forward to 9:06) and notes.
